creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've already made these patches and am sitting on them until the ports thaw. 

Mailing the gd authors to tell them to reverse their stupidity of changing history 
by changing gd-1.8 would fix this for the gazillion people who install 4.0-RELEASE 
and try and built one of the 10 or so ports that depend on gd.
